provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, iron plate gauntlet for the right hand, articulated finger plates connected with chain links, broad cuff flaring at the wrist, the iron surface shows hammer marks from the forge and scratches from combat, dark iron with a few spots of surface rust, functional heavy design without decoration

judgment.explanation: Similar to base but with gold lion emboss on back. Slightly more ornate. Same strong material read and dark bg.
